creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
This may or may not be our server, but Wireshark 2.6.x worked with GTK 3.

Trying to start Wireshark via SSH (Putty), X11 forwarding is enabled. xclock starts fine with Xming. Trying to start Wireshark gives me:

> root@deblndw011x - ~
> 2057 # wireshark
> qt.qpa.xcb: X server does not support XInput 2
> failed to get the current screen resources
> libGL error: unable to load driver: swrast_dri.so
> libGL error: failed to load driver: swrast
> The X11 connection broke: I/O error (code 1)
> XIO:  fatal IO error 35 (Resource temporarily unavailable) on X server ":10.0"
>       after 363 requests (363 known processed) with 0 events remaining.

I am running off
> FreeBSD deblndw011x.ad001.siemens.net 12.0-STABLE FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE r344655 DEBLNDW011X  amd64
